hero.title: Find Racket Sport Courts Near You
hero.subtitle: The easiest way to find and book padel, pickleball, tennis, squash, and badminton courts in Dubai and across the UAE.

features.title: Everything You Need to Play More

map.title: Interactive Map
map.desc: Find courts and clubs near you with location-based search powered by real geographic data.

community.title: Player Matchmaking
community.desc: Post a request or browse listings to find training partners, hitting partners, and doubles teams.

events.title: Local Events
events.desc: Discover tournaments, open days, and social sessions at facilities near you.

reviews.title: Verified Reviews
reviews.desc: Read honest reviews from real players before you book a court or join a club.

cta_section.title: Own a Racket Sports Facility?
cta_section.subtitle: List your courts for free. Reach thousands of players searching for courts across Dubai and the UAE.

personalized.welcome_back_body: Pick up where you left off — {sport} in {city}

map.title: Find Courts & Clubs
map.search_placeholder: Search by name, sport, or location...
map.no_results: No facilities found. Try adjusting your filters.
map.outside_uae: Saha is currently only available in the UAE. Coming soon to your region!
map.onboarding_tooltip: Tap a facility on the map or in the list to see courts and book a slot.

facility.no_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to leave one!
facility.review_confirm_delete: Delete this review? This cannot be undone.
facility.review_rating_required: Please pick a rating between 1 and 5.
facility.review_player_only: Reviews are a player action. Sign in with a player account to write a review.
facility.booking_player_only: Booking is a player action. Sign in with a player account to book this court.

community.title: Player Matchmaking
community.subtitle: Find training partners, hitting partners, and doubles teams in your area.
community.no_posts: No posts yet. Be the first!
community.non_player_body: Matchmaking is a player feature. Your account is signed in as a facility owner / admin. Sign out and create a separate player account to post or respond to matchmaking requests.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Tournaments, open days, and social sessions near you.

event_tags.label: Event tags (optional)
event_tags.hint: Help players find events that fit their preferences. Tags are reviewed by admins.

register.title: Create an Account
register.subtitle: Join the Saha community
register.name: Full Name
register.error_email_taken: This email is already in use.
register.success: Account created! Please check your email to confirm.
register.agree_prefix: By creating an account I agree to Saha's

forgot_password.title: Reset Your Password
forgot_password.subtitle: We'll send you a reset link
forgot_password.success_detail: We sent a reset link to {email}. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgot_password.not_registered_body: We don't have an account for {email}. Create one or try a different email.
forgot_password.rate_limited_body: Please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.

reset_password.title: Set New Password
reset_password.success: Password updated. You can now log in.

overview.title: Dashboard
overview.complete_onboarding: Complete your facility onboarding to get listed.
overview.facilities_switcher_hint: 1 of {count} facilities — switch from the sidebar.

onboarding.title: Facility Onboarding
onboarding.success_desc: Our team will review your facility within 2 business days and get in touch with you.
onboarding.ai_hint: Let AI draft a short description from your facility name, sports, and city. You can edit it later.

bookings.title: Bookings & Revenue
bookings.stripe_not_connected: Not connected — connect Stripe to receive payouts

dashboard_facilities.title: Your Facilities
dashboard_facilities.description: Manage all your venues from one place. Switch the active facility to scope the rest of the dashboard.

dashboard_availability.heading: Availability
dashboard_availability.description: Open time slots so players can book your courts
dashboard_availability.no_slots_help: No slots open for this day. Add slots or use Quick Fill to generate a full day.
dashboard_availability.error_end_after_start: End time must be after start time
dashboard_availability.error_from_before_to: From time must be before to time
dashboard_availability.generate_preview: {count, plural, =0 {Generate slots automatically} =1 {Generate # slot automatically} other {Generate # slots automatically}}

dashboard_events.heading: Events
dashboard_events.onboarding_required: Please complete onboarding to submit events.
dashboard_events.description: Manage and submit events for your facility.

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.subtitle: Your court booking history
bookings.cancel_confirm: Cancel this booking? If it's more than 24 hours away, you'll get a full refund.
bookings.cancel_series_confirm: Cancel the remaining {count} weeks of this series? Refunds apply only to weeks more than 24 hours away.
bookings.cancel_series_hint: Cancelling this week only releases this slot. Cancelling the series releases every future week — refunds go back to your card automatically.
bookings.series_cancelled: Series cancelled ({count} weeks). No refund issued — all weeks were within 24 hours.
bookings.series_cancelled_with_refund: Series cancelled ({count} weeks). {amount} AED refunded to your card.

booking_detail.confirmed_desc: Your court is reserved. See you there!
booking_detail.cancelled_desc: Payment was not completed. The slot has been released.
booking_detail.pending_desc: Complete your payment to confirm this booking.
booking_detail.series_position: Week {index} of {total} in your weekly series

quick_review.heading: How was your game?
quick_review.comment_too_short: If you write a comment, it needs at least 10 characters.
quick_review.comment_placeholder: Anything to share with future players? Optional.
quick_review.comment_hint: Leave it blank if you just want to drop a star rating.
quick_review.thanks_body: Your review helps other players choose a great venue.
quick_review.already_reviewed: You have already reviewed this facility.
quick_review.rls_blocked: Reviews open after a completed booking at this facility.

stripe_connect.ready_body: Your courts are bookable. Players can pay directly and payouts go to your bank account.
stripe_connect.verifying_body: You've submitted everything Stripe needs. They're now verifying your details.
stripe_connect.verifying_hint: Stripe verification typically completes in a few hours, sometimes up to 1–2 business days. Your courts will be bookable as soon as it's done — no action needed from you.
stripe_connect.needs_action_body: Stripe is waiting on the following from you before charges can be enabled. Click below to continue verification — you'll upload these directly in Stripe's hosted form.
stripe_connect.incomplete_body: Stripe still needs a bit more from you before payouts can land.
stripe_connect.checklist_details: Submit the remaining business / identity details.
stripe_connect.checklist_charges: Confirm your bank account so charges can be enabled.
stripe_connect.split_disclosure: On every booking, Stripe transfers {owner}% to your connected account and Saha keeps a {platform}% platform fee. Payouts go directly to the bank account on file in Stripe — Saha never holds your money.
stripe_connect.disconnect_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
stripe_connect.connect_failed: Could not start Stripe onboarding. Please try again.
stripe_connect.hosted_hint: You'll be taken to Stripe to enter your business and bank details. Takes about 3 minutes.

wallet.hint_can_apply: Apply at checkout to save on your next booking.
wallet.hint_earn: Complete 10 bookings to earn your first credit.
wallet.hero_hint_balance: Tap Apply at checkout to use your credit.
wallet.hero_hint_zero: Every 10 completed bookings earns you a credit toward a free hour.
wallet.progress_text: {current} of {target} completed bookings since your last reward.
wallet.how_it_works_body: Every 10 completed bookings, we credit your wallet with the average value of those bookings (capped at AED 50). At checkout, redeem up to 10% of the booking total — the rest is paid via Stripe.

booking_widget.sign_in_prompt: Sign in to book a court
booking_widget.heading: Book a Court
booking_widget.no_slots: No slots available on this date.
booking_widget.slots_error_past_date: Pick today or a future date.
booking_widget.slots_error_no_court: This court isn't available right now. Try another court.
booking_widget.slots_error_no_slots_defined: The owner hasn't published any time slots for this date yet. Try another date.
booking_widget.slots_error_all_booked: All slots are booked for this date. Try another date.
booking_widget.slots_error_error: Could not load slots. Please try again.

move_booking.heading: Move this booking
move_booking.rules: Pick a free slot on the same court, same duration. Move once, at least 24 hours before your original time. Price stays the same.
move_booking.no_slots: No free same-duration slots on this date.

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your profile and notification preferences.
account.phone_hint: Include country code. Used to send booking confirmations and reminders via WhatsApp.

facility_form.heading: Manage Facility
facility_form.subheading: Update your facility details, sports offered, and opening hours.
facility_form.trn_hint: Optional. 15-digit UAE FTA TRN. When set, invoices show as Tax Invoices with 5% VAT.
facility_form.no_photos: No photos have been added yet.
facility_form.photos_hint: Upload photos of your courts and facility. You can reorder or remove images after upload.
facility_form.sports_hint: Select all sports available at your facility.
facility_form.stripe_desc: Connect your Stripe account to receive payments directly from players. We take a 10% platform fee per booking.
facility_form.stripe_not_connected: Not connected — players cannot book your courts until you connect Stripe.
facility_form.stripe_disconnect_confirm: Disconnect your Stripe account? Players will not be able to book your courts until you reconnect.
facility_form.prayer_hint: Help Muslim players plan around prayer times. Shown as a "Prayer-friendly" badge on your facility profile and search results.

hours_form.heading: Opening Hours
hours_form.subheading: Set your facility's weekly schedule. Players will see these hours on your profile.

courts.no_courts: No courts yet. Add your first court to start taking bookings.

checkin_scanner.instructions: Align the QR code inside the frame. Check-in fires automatically.
checkin_scanner.invalid: Could not read this code — try again
checkin_scanner.camera_error: Could not access the camera. Allow camera permissions and reload.

image_uploader.max_images_error: You can upload up to {max} images.
image_uploader.invalid_type_error: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.
image_uploader.file_too_large_error: Image must be {max_mb} MB or smaller.
image_uploader.format_hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Up to {max} images.

events_form.policy_notice: Events promoting alcohol, gambling, or indecent themes will be rejected. Please review our Community Guidelines before submitting.
events_form.edit_resets_status: Saving will reset this event to pending so admins can re-review.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cookie_banner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. We do not use tracking cookies without your consent.

footer.tagline: The sports facility directory in the UAE.

community_guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
community_guidelines.intro: Saha is a UAE-first racket sports community. These guidelines keep it respectful, family-friendly, and focused on play.

common.no_facility_onboard: No facility found. Complete onboarding first.
common.facility_not_found_or_denied: Facility not found or access denied

events.name_too_short: Event name must be at least 3 characters.

courts.time_inverted: From time must be before to time
courts.time_range_too_short: Time range is shorter than the slot duration
courts.slot_exists: A slot already exists at that time
courts.could_not_load_slots: Could not load slots. Please try again.
courts.no_slots_published: No time slots are published for this date yet.
courts.all_slots_booked: All slots are booked for this date.
courts.pick_future_date: Pick today or a future date.

booking.already_moved: This booking has already been moved once
booking.move_window: Bookings can only be moved at least 24 hours in advance
booking.only_confirmed_move: Only confirmed bookings can be moved
booking.only_confirmed_split: Only confirmed bookings can be split
booking.already_split: This booking has already been split.
booking.cross_facility: This booking is at a different facility
booking.cross_court: Cross-court moves are not yet supported
booking.different_duration: Selected slot must be the same duration as your booking
booking.slot_unavailable: Selected slot is no longer available
booking.slot_just_taken: Selected slot was just taken — please pick another
booking.weekly_slot_taken: One of the weekly slots was just taken — please try again.
booking.facility_not_ready: This facility is not yet ready to receive payments.
booking.verify_facility_payment_failed: Could not verify the facility's payment account. Please try again.
booking.could_not_move: Could not move booking — please try again
booking.could_not_start_payment: Could not start payment. Please try again.
booking.payment_expired: Your payment session has expired. The slot has been released — please book again.
booking.nothing_to_cancel_series: Nothing to cancel — every future week is already past or cancelled.
booking.qr_not_found: Booking not found for this QR code
booking.checkin_failed: Could not check in — please try again
booking.too_many_attempts: Too many booking attempts. Try again in {seconds}s.
booking.weeks_unavailable: Some weeks are unavailable at this time: week {weeks}. Pick a different time or fewer weeks.
booking.checkin_wrong_date: This booking is for {date}, not today
booking.checkin_wrong_status: Booking status is "{status}" — cannot check in

review.already_reviewed: You have already reviewed this facility.
review.needs_completed_booking: You can leave a review after your first completed booking here.

profile.phone_invalid: Enter a valid number with country code (e.g. +971501234567).
profile.phone_must_verify: Verify the new phone number via WhatsApp first.
profile.otp_expired: Code expired — request a new one.
profile.otp_rate_phone: Too many codes sent to this number. Try again in {minutes} min.
profile.otp_rate_user: Daily verification limit reached. Try again in {hours} h.

auth.email_in_use: This email is already in use.

ai.missing_inputs: Need facility name, at least one sport, and city
ai.needs_sport: Pick at least one sport first
ai.generation_failed: Could not generate a description right now.
ai.unavailable: Search assistant is unavailable right now.

admin.audit_reason_required: Please provide a reason for the admin edit (required for the audit log).
admin.no_self_role: You can't change your own role.
admin.no_map_coords: This facility has no map coordinates yet. Ask the owner to re-save their address from the dashboard, then try approving again.
admin.address_not_found: We couldn't locate that address on the map. Double-check the street and city, then try again.
